summary: South Bay startups are on a historic funding tear: Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), Rhoda AI (Palo Alto), and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) each landed $450M+ in March, while chip designers SiFive (Santa Clara) and Ayar Labs (San Jose) pulled in $400M-plus. Most local companies are hiring, though two are trimming. Meanwhile, San Jose State hosts a panel this week on AI's social costs.
